content.content: A Puerto Rican TV host, she is most known for her show on Univision, Anda Pa'l Cara. She got her start by working as an actress and gaining notoriety for parodying host Gricel Mamery on the show, Anda Pa'l Cara. She would later be offered the hosting job. In addition to her hosting jobs on TV she has also worked in radio, particularly on the show Gozando en la Mañana on Fidelity 95.7 FM. She married businessman David Bernier in 2007, and they had two children, Adrian and Miranda. She and singerRicky Martinare both originally from Puerto Rico.
